description_long: This is a classic Coca-Cola vending machine with a predominantly red exterior and white branding, positioned against a wall with a decorative border. The front features a vertical array of product selection buttons, a payment interface, and a product retrieval slot, all set within a rectangular panel. The sides of the machine display large, detailed images of a Coca-Cola glass bottle, reinforcing the brand identity. The top and back of the machine are less detailed, with the back panel appearing plain and slightly worn. The machine is constructed from metal with a glossy painted finish, and its robust build suggests it is designed for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A red Coca-Cola vending machine with prominent branding, product selection buttons, and a retrieval slot, flanked by large bottle images on each side.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Coca-Cola logo, product selection buttons, payment interface, and retrieval slot, all set on a red background.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a large Coca-Cola glass bottle image and the edge of the front panel.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly plain and gray, with minimal detail and some visible wear or damage near the bottom.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, featuring another large Coca-Cola bottle image and the side panel.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper front, featuring product images and possibly illuminated areas, but no clear digital screen is visible.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the right side of the front panel, including a coin slot and possibly a bill acceptor, but no card reader or contactless terminal is clearly visible.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: There are six individual product selection buttons arranged vertically on the front, each labeled with a product image.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located near the bottom center of the front panel, with a dark opening and possibly a flap.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large white Coca-Cola logos are prominently displayed on the front and both sides, with additional branding in the form of glass bottle images on the sides.
